original_snippet_context: Exchange rates and banking information from various cities.
relevant_quote: Rio, 11—Durante todo o dia vi-gorou a taxa bancaria de 15 11/32 com letras a 15 13/32 e comprado-res a 15 15-32.
justification: This section reports the prevailing exchange rates for the mil-réis in Rio de Janeiro, which, while related to the context of monetary discussions and a potential Caixa de Conversão, doesn't express any explicit or implicit opinion about the conversion rate or policies related to the Caixa. It's purely informational.
